# Prompt Variants

## Variant A: Near Figure

Track all blue highlights and deduce one motif clearly traceable to the blue composition. Use sparse upper marks as a tilted head halo, staggered middle blocks as a broken spine, and denser lower-right marks as bent legs. Render a cobalt somnambulist stepping out of manuscript-night in a fin-de-siecle Symbolist and proto-Art Nouveau nocturne mood (1890-1910 feeling), with soft impressionist diffusion, restrained atmosphere, and strong silhouette readability.

## Variant B: Mid Distance

Track all blue highlights and deduce one motif clearly traceable to the blue composition. Preserve the same geometry but pull the camera to mid distance and increase negative space. Render in fin-de-siecle Symbolist / proto-Art Nouveau nocturne language with diffuse brush softness and low-light literary restraint.

## Variant C: Grounded Tension

Track all blue highlights and deduce one motif clearly traceable to the blue composition, emphasizing the lower-right density as grounded tension and claw-like footing. Keep the cobalt somnambulist motif, 1890-1910 nocturne feeling, and controlled impressionist diffusion. Avoid unrelated objects or ornamental clutter.
